name: Cannot find gift card after selling a new gift card and then voiding the item Gift Card

steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "6727"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('7', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('2', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('7', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Alexis" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "GIFT CARD" category
When I add the "Acrylic removal" service to my cart
And I click on the total price of "Acrylic removal"
Click locator('.xTicketItems__info').filter({ has: locator('.itemName').filter({ hasText: 'Acrylic removal' }) }).locator('.xTicketItems__total')
When I select the "GIFT CARD" category
Then I should see the "Gift card $50" service
When I add the "Gift card $50" service to my cart
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Activate Gift Card $50.00"
And I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see my cart showing 2 item added
And I should see the service "Gift card $50 (2003)" in my cart
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Close Ticket"
And I should see a popup dialog with content "CHANGE$0.00OK"
When I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I reopen ticket with payment amount "$75.7"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$75.7' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$75.7' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$75.7' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the user info "Alexis" in the ticket
When I click on the item "VOID ITEM" button
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "VOID MULTIPLE"
When I select the "Gift card $50 (2003)" service in the dialog
And I click on the "Void Items" button in the dialog
Then I should see my cart showing 1 item added
When I wait for the page fully loaded
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I remove payment history "Cash" in ticket view
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Close Ticket"
And I should see a popup dialog with content "CHANGE$0.00OK"
When I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the GIFT_CARD_BALANCE page
And I click on the "SEARCH" button
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see a popup dialog containing the title "ACTIVATE GIFT CARD"
And I should see a popup dialog with content "Do you want to activate gift card #2003"
When I clock out the timesheet with PIN "6727"
